title: How the CIA Helped Locate a Missing Airman After Iran Downed a U.S. Fighter Jet
summary_full: The intelligence agency also executed a deception campaign aimed at drawing Iranian forces away from where the missing Air Force officer was hiding.
summary_public: The intelligence agency also executed a deception campaign aimed at drawing Iranian forces away from where the missing Air Force officer was hiding.
